# Robots.txt for b2b.click - Event Platform SEO Optimization
# Allow search engines to crawl public content while protecting admin areas

User-agent: *
# Allow public event pages and homepage
Allow: /
Allow: /event/
Allow: /drop/
Allow: /home
Allow: /about
Allow: /contact
Allow: /events
Allow: /static/
Allow: /images/
Allow: /css/
Allow: /js/
# Legacy React bundle path removed

# Disallow admin and private areas
Disallow: /admin/
Disallow: /dashboard/
Disallow: /api/
Disallow: /login
Disallow: /logout
Disallow: /settings
Disallow: /stats
Disallow: /create-admin
Disallow: /reset-password
Disallow: /verify-email

# Allow AI-specific API endpoints
Allow: /api/ai/
Allow: /api/ai/site-info
Allow: /api/ai/events-summary
Allow: /api/ai/faq

# Disallow URL shortener paths (focus SEO on events)
Disallow: /*/stats
Disallow: /*/edit
Disallow: /*/delete

# Allow specific files
Allow: /sitemap.xml
Allow: /llms.txt
Allow: /manifest.webmanifest

# Sitemap location
Sitemap: https://b2b.click/sitemap.xml

# Specific bot permissions
User-agent: Googlebot
Allow: /
Crawl-delay: 1

User-agent: Bingbot
Allow: /
Crawl-delay: 1

User-agent: Slurp
Allow: /
Crawl-delay: 1

User-agent: DuckDuckBot
Allow: /
Crawl-delay: 1

User-agent: facebookexternalhit
Allow: /

User-agent: Twitterbot
Allow: /

User-agent: LinkedInBot
Allow: /

# AI Agent Crawlers (2024-2025)
User-agent: ChatGPT-User
Allow: /
Crawl-delay: 1

User-agent: GPTBot
Allow: /
Crawl-delay: 1

User-agent: Google-Extended
Allow: /
Crawl-delay: 1

User-agent: Claude-Web
Allow: /
Crawl-delay: 1

User-agent: PerplexityBot
Allow: /
Crawl-delay: 1

User-agent: YouBot
Allow: /
Crawl-delay: 1

User-agent: anthropic-ai
Allow: /
Crawl-delay: 1

User-agent: Applebot-Extended
Allow: /
Crawl-delay: 1

# AI Training Data Crawlers
User-agent: CCBot
Allow: /
Crawl-delay: 2

User-agent: ChatGPT-User
Allow: /llms.txt
Allow: /sitemap.xml
Allow: /

User-agent: Bard
Allow: /
Crawl-delay: 1

# Default crawl delay for respectful crawling
Crawl-delay: 1

# Host directive for canonical domain
Host: https://b2b.click
